prompt: I need to set up DNS for my domain example.com using Terraform with Namecheap. The domain should point to IP 192.0.2.100, have a www subdomain, and I want to use Google Workspace for email. Can you write the Terraform configuration?

assertions.name: has_provider_block
assertions.description: Configuration includes namecheap provider block with required_providers

assertions.name: has_apex_a_record
assertions.description: Configuration has A record for @ (apex) pointing to correct IP

assertions.name: has_www_cname
assertions.description: Configuration has CNAME for www subdomain

assertions.name: has_google_mx_records
assertions.description: Configuration includes Google Workspace MX records

assertions.name: trailing_dots_correct
assertions.description: CNAME and MX addresses have trailing dots for FQDNs
assertions.check: CNAME and MX addresses end with '.'
